403.description:
PRIV-9: tenant accounts are created by landlord/caretaker
invitation only. Pre-fix, anyone could POST here, mint a
tenant token, and reach landlord-scoped tenant endpoints
because TenantScope's writes-allowed-pre-auth gap keeps the
record visible until landlord_id is set. There is no business
case for unauthenticated public registration in this app, so
the endpoint is closed; see TenantInvitationController for
the supported flow.

message.const: Registration is invitation-only. Contact your landlord for an invitation link.

get.summary:
OBS-2: real health probe — DB, Redis, queue, webhook DLQ depth.
Returns 200 only when every check is green so load balancers /
uptime monitors can act on the result. Replaces the previous
static literal that said 'ok' regardless of underlying state

message.const: Amount mismatch - flagged for manual review

200.description:
HANDLE-1: 503 + retry message instead of generic 500 — this is
a transient outage, not a permanent failure.

message.const: STK Push sent. Please enter your M-Pesa PIN on your phone.

BusinessShortCode.description:
PRIV-5: scope tenant lookup to the landlord owning this Till
 so a colliding phone number across landlords can't get
 cross-credited. Unknown shortcode -> landlordId null ->
 findTenantByPhone returns null -> we DLQ the payment below.
